name: memory-arbor-codex
description: Memory Arbor Codex integration using shared skills, MCP tools, and incremental prompt hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Load Memory Arbor context through memory_status
interface.longDescription: Use Memory Arbor skills and MCP tools from Codex. memory_status explicitly returns the loaded-memory projection; prompt hooks only send later changes, never a new-session snapshot.
defaultPrompt: Use the shared Memory Arbor store for this repository.
Call memory_status when loaded memory is needed, then apply later prompt deltas.
